# Material 3 from design to deployment

<div class="video-container">
  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/7nrhTdS7dHg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Description

Learn how to build the basil material study in Flutter with advanced theming techniques that support multiple device contexts.

Speakers: Rody Davis, Liam Spradlin

Watch more:
Watch all the sessions → https://goo.gle/FlutterForwardYT
